Attack Description: Attacker changes L_T3 thresholds (which control PU4/PU5) by gaining control of PLC3. Low levels in T3.
SCADA Concealment: Replay attack on L_T3, as well as PU4/PU5 flow and status.

Attack Description: Attack alters L_T2 readings arriving to PLC3, which reads a low level and keeps valve V2 OPEN, leading T2 to overflow.

SCADA Concealment: Replay attack on L_T2, V2 flow and status, as well as V2 inlet + outlet pressure readings (P_J14, P_J422).

Attack Description: Attacker changes L_T7 thresholds (which control PU10/PU11) by gaining control of PLC5, causing the pumps to switch ON/OFF continuously.
SCADA Concealment: Replay attack on L_T7, PU10/PU11 flow and status, as well as inlet + outlet pressure readings (P_J14, P_J422). Inlet pressure concealment terminates before that of other variables.

Attack Description: Alteration of T4 signal arriving to PLC6. Overflow in T6.
